currentLinkedIn.headline: Senior Data Scientist at CartCo | Recommender Systems · Causal Inference · Python
currentLinkedIn.about: I build ML models that drive measurable revenue impact. Eight years translating business questions into experiments, and experiments into shipped features.

experience.title: Senior Data Scientist
bullets: Redesigned product recommendation engine using two-tower neural net; lifted add-to-cart rate by 18% ($24M ARR impact)
Ran 40+ A/B experiments end-to-end including power analysis, instrumentation, and stakeholder readout
Mentored a team of three data scientists on causal inference methods and experiment design

experience.title: Data Scientist
bullets: Built dynamic pricing model for 500K SKUs using gradient boosting; increased gross margin by 3.2pp
Established a feature store shared across five ML projects, cutting feature development time by 40%
